overall.description: A cinematic stationary view of a medieval Gothic great hall with high vaulted wooden ceilings, stone walls, and long dining tables, from a video game. Characters in dark school robes periodically walk down the central aisle toward the camera while soft natural light filters through tall windows at the far end.

scene_state.functional_zone: great hall with dining tables and vaulted ceiling

events.description: student in dark robes enters from background and begins walking down central aisle toward camera
student passes close to camera and exits frame bottom

agents.ego_description: stationary observation of the great hall interior from fixed position

notable_agents.action: student in dark robes walking down the central aisle toward the camera, passing by the long tables

entered.detail: high arched ceiling with exposed dark wooden beams and trusses
grey stone block walls with Gothic architectural details
long rectangular dining tables with benches arranged in rows
blue patterned rug running down the central aisle between tables
large arched windows at the far end allowing bright natural light to enter
vertical banners hanging from ceiling near the windows
large stone fireplace on the left wall with mantelpiece

segments.scene_description: The camera holds a steady view of a grand Gothic great hall with vaulted wooden ceilings and stone walls. Long wooden dining tables line both sides of a blue carpet runner. At 15 seconds, a student in dark robes enters from the distant end and walks toward the camera, passing by the tables and exiting the frame after 22 seconds.

scene_state.functional_zone: great hall with dining tables and vaulted ceiling

events.description: second student enters from background walking toward camera
second student passes camera and exits frame

agents.ego_description: continuing stationary observation as another student approaches and passes

notable_agents.action: second student in dark robes walking down the central aisle toward the camera

segments.scene_description: The scene remains static with the same grand hall architecture. After a quiet interval, a second student in dark robes enters from the far end at 45 seconds and walks down the central aisle, passing the camera at 52 seconds. The hall maintains its atmospheric lighting with students visible sitting at distant tables.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady, atmospheric view of a grand Gothic great hall as solitary figures punctuate the stillness of the architecture. It begins with a wide, static gaze across the vaulted wooden ceilings and stone walls, where long dining tables flank a central blue carpet runner. As the silence lingers, a student in dark robes emerges from the distant end of the hall and walks steadily toward the camera before exiting the frame. The scene then returns to a quiet interval, with distant students visible at their tables under the soft filtered light, before a second robed figure appears at the far end. This second student follows the same central path, moving through the cavernous space until they finally pass the camera.
